arts.ttl: PSG (3) 2-1 (1) Arsenal: Gunners set new unwanted club streak following Champions League elimination
arts.sum: Arsenal set a new unwanted club record following their elimination from the Champions League at the hands of Paris Saint-Germain in France this evening.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta insists Arsenal were the BEST team in the Champions League despite PSG loss - and reveals stars' emotional reaction in dressing room
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN AT PARC DES PRINCES: An emotional Mikel Arteta claimed Arsenal did not deserve to lose against Paris Saint-Germain after they crashed out of the Champions League.

arts.ttl: ‘We are the league of farmers’ – PSG head coach Luis Enrique pokes fun after knocking Liverpool, Aston Villa and Arsenal out of the Champions League
arts.sum: PSG head coach Luis Enrique was in a joyful mood after Les Parisiens qualified for the Champions League final at Arsenal’s expense. The Ligue 1 champions inflicted an aggregate 3-1 defeat…

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta brands Arsenal as the best team in the Champions League after PSG heartbreak
arts.sum: Arsenal’s dreams of Champions League mortality were crushed by Paris Saint-Germain

arts.ttl: PSG (3) 2-1 (1) Arsenal: Mikel Arteta praises squad, bemoans bad luck, makes bold claim following semi-final exit
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta claims his Arsenal team have been the best in the Champions League this season, despite being knocked out by PSG in the semi-finals this evening.

arts.ttl: What PSG bench told Mikel Arteta seconds after full time as Arsenal boss delivers unflinching Champions League verdict
arts.sum: Arteta spoke to TNT Sports at full-time as the Gunners suffered semi-final heartache by losing 3-1 on aggregate

arts.ttl: Arsenal fans all say the same thing about Bukayo Saka moment in PSG defeat
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka's goal in the 76th minute gave Arsenal hope in their Champions League semi-final second leg, but minutes later the England international missed a golden opportunity

arts.ttl: ‘Their best player has been the goalkeeper’ – Mikel Arteta reacts to Arsenal’s Champions League exit to PSG
arts.sum: Arsenal have been knocked out of the Champions League semi-finals by PSG following their 2-1 away loss at Paris’ Parc des Princes this Wednesday night. Tonight’s loss means that the…

arts.ttl: Arsenal’s Champions League dream over after semi-final defeat to PSG
arts.sum: The Parisians eased to a 3-1 aggregate victory.

arts.ttl: Dembélé on bench for PSG, Arsenal's Partey starts
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain star Ousmane Dembélé will start on the bench in Wednesday night's Champions League semifinal second leg against Arsenal in Paris.
